source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #70
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. Beyond the Horizon posted a video using the Fimbul BYOS Packlite in the Star Atlas
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
Star Atlas Chatter #5 – REC, Get Your MIND Right! Week in Review 7/8 – 7/15 2023
RahMega posted a video recapping the past week of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Chatter #5 — REC, Get your MIND right!
RahMega published an article recapping the past week of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas Fimbul BYOS Packlite Flight Rip
Beyond the Horizon posted a video using the Fimbul BYOS Packlite in the Star Atlas Showroom.
STAR ATLAS #190 How To Get Famous In Star Atlas with Photography
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas updates.
Lets Testflight Star Atlas Ogrika Ships!
Beyond The Horizon posted a video trying out some ships in the Star Atlas Showroom.
Metaverse Nomads #103 Star Atlas w/ Enigma 42 | ROME
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their latest Star Atlas live stream.
3D Printed PEARCE C11
Enigma 42 posted a video of some of the 3D Star Atlas ship models he is selling.
4 Things To Expect From Star Atlas This Week
The Hologram published an article about 4 things to expect from Star Atlas this week.
Star Atlas Core Episode 1 Dramatized Reading & SFX
OCG Thor posted a video reading the Episode 1 of the Star Atlas Core comic.
4 Things to Expect From Star Atlas This Week
The Hologram News Network posted a video about 4 things to expect from Star Atlas.
A New Chapter Begins — Never Alone Mission 2: The Search for Etira is now live!
Star Atlas published an article about the new mission in Never Alone.
9 Star Atlas NEVER ALONE Mission 2 Starts Today!!! | CTA For The Community
Pathfinder posted a video about Mission 2 in Never Alone.
Star Atlas Never Alone Mission 2: The Search For Etira Lore
The Hologram published an article of the lore of the Star Atlas Never Alone Mission 2.
STAR ATLAS – Never Alone Mission 2 is here!!
Atlas Theory posted a video about the Never Alone Mission 2.
Star Atlas Never Alone Mission 2 – Exclusive Loot, Lore, and More!
The Hologram News Network posted a video about loot in Mission 2.
Star Atlas Core Episode 2 Dramatized Reading
OCG Thor posted a video reading the Episode 2 of the Star Atlas Core comic.
the Atlas brew #72
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the Atlas Brew #72.
LIVE: Michael Wagner (CEO) at PlayGG
The Hologram posted a video of the PlayGG Star Atlas presentation.
Infinite Metaverse Starts Now: Star Atlas and MetaGravity to Bring 30,000+ Concurrent Players to the Game
Star Atlas published an article announcing a partnership with MetaGravity for concurrent players in Star Atlas.
Solana Play GG Day 1 was a blast! Catch us on Day 2 at the Star Atlas booth!
The Hologram News Networks posted a video from the PlayGG show.
This is MASSIVE for Star Atlas!!
Atlas Theory posted a video of highlights from the PlayGG show.
